arts.ttl: Juventus double down: Thiago Motta reconsiders Ferguson-Zirkzee duo
arts.sum: La Gazzetta dello Sport report that, In a bold move, Juventus are preparing for a significant transfer shake-up this January. The potential departures of Nicolò Fagioli and Douglas Luiz could pave the way for an extensive restructuring of the squad, addressing both defensive vulnerabilities and offensive aspirations. Defensive Reinforcements The Turin giants are facing a defensive crisis following season-ending injuries to Gleison Bremer and Juan Cabal. To shore up their backline, Juventus are eyeing Antonio Silva from Benfica as a primary target. The club hopes to secure Silva on a loan deal, leveraging the connections of agent Jorge Mendes.
